description: Close FEAT-011's criterion 9 residue gap (evaluated PARTIAL on current main): the off-repo-conditions and engine-bypassing-writes residue classes are stated nowhere on the feature's surfaces, though the prose-truth and authored-judgment classes are. Docs-only; no engine change.
acceptance_criteria: Each of the four residue classes is stated on at least one op-string surface and the README currency text, phrased as flagged-for-review (at best flagged for human review, never prevented; off-repo facts beyond engine observation), with no surface claiming total foreclosure of semantic currency
